1.content:
The eyes of the Jedi Council are on you. It almost feels like they are peering into your soul. There is nothing you can hide from them.
"Sense something in you, I do" Master Yoda said.
"What is it Master" You replied.
"Desire. Sexual desire, for female feet, you have." Answered Yoda.
He was completely right. You've always had one. You can't have these desires if you're gonna be a Master.
"Yes Master. For years. What must I do? You asked.
"Indulge in it, you must." Yoda said.
"How"
"Worship the feet of a woman, you must. Free, you will be. Use the world between worlds, you may. May the Force be with you". Yoda said.
You bowed and left. You were surprised, Yoda actually wanted you to act on your foot fetish? And you can use the world between worlds?
"Where the hell do I go" You said.
1.title: The Adventure Begins

choices: Dig right in and start worshipping
12.content:
You don't feel comfortable using the world between worlds right now, so you decide to stay in the present and on Coruscant. Theres only one person who's feet you've wanted the most; Master Skywalker's apprentice, Ahsoka Tano. You decided you should go see her.
You knocked on the door of her room.
"Enter", she replied.
You entered the room. She was wearing brown boots while lying on her bed. She sat up when you entered.
"Hey, whats up" She asked.
"Nothing, just seeing what you were doing. How was your battle?" You asked.
"It went well. Limited casualties, and I saved Master Skywalker from some buzz droids" She said
"I'm assuming you made Anakin well aware of that? You said.
"Of course. So, did you need something" She asked.
You felt really embarrassed for this, but you had to to get promoted.
"Uh yeah...Ahsoka, can I ask you for a favor? You asked awkwardly.
"Anything, I'm here for you" She replied, patting your shoulder.
"I'm in the middle of my trials right now...and well...Master Yoda said I need to indulge in my desires...and well...I kinda have a foot fetish" You said.
"A foot fetish? Wait...do you want...you want my feet?" She asked.
"Uh, yeah? Is that okay?" You asked.
You and Ahsoka always had a special connection. If dating for Jedi were allowed, you'd probably be together.
"Well, I suppose. Anything to help you succeed" She said. "What do you want to do"
12.title: Ahsoka's Room

info.brief_description: A Jedi indulges in his foot fetish
info.description: This story follows a Jedi with a foot fetish. You are a Jedi Knight who must indulge in his foot fetish to become a Jedi Master. You can use the World between Worlds, which means you can enter any time and place in the Star Wars timeline. Any FEMALE is available for use. Enjoy!
